description: You have no hair on your face, it is shaven or simply untouched by the presence of hair.
You have a short beard at the tip of your chin.
You have a mustache and a short beard, that both form a circle around your lips.
You have a mustache and a short beard forming a patch under your lips.
You have a mustache and a beard starting with a strip going down from the bottom lip, then tracing the jaw lines.  It looks a bit like an anchor, thus the name.

name.str: Artificial facial hair: short boxed beard

description: You have a mustache and a short beard with trimmed sides.  Thin patches connect them both, forming a 'box' around the lips, thus the name.
You have a mustache that covers your entire top lip.
You have a short trimmed mustache and beard imitating a 3-day stubble.
You have a mustache with patches going down the chin from both ends, thus the name.
You have a mustache with shortened ends, that covers only the skin above your upper lip.

name.str: Artificial facial hair: mutton chops beard

description: You have long sideburns that connect to your mustache, with the tip of the chin shaven clean.
You have a horseshoe mustache and disconnected sideburns.
You have a short beard in a form of a vertical patch under your bottom lip.
You have a full beard without a mustache, restricted to the chin, sometimes called a 'lion's mane'. Much like Abraham Lincoln's beard.
You have a beard along the jaw lines, circling the chin, and no mustache.
You have a mustache and a long beard, both formed by allowing free growth of hair, with no particular styling.
You have a mustache with long flared out ends.
You have a beard formed from hair grown on neck below the chin line.  No mustache included.
You have a very thin mustache just above the line of the upper lip.
Long full beard with no mustache, popular among Amish community, often with two pointed ends.
You have patches of hair in front of your ears, that normally would connect your hair with the beard, but they are here by themselves.
You have a little bit of hair in the dip under your lower lip, and no other facial hair whatsoever.
Charlie Chaplin used to have this short patch of hair just under the nose, but then that other guy used it as a characteristic, and it became unwelcome.
You have a handlebar mustache with a chin strip or a small goatee.
You have a long thick mustache, overshadowing your lips, that somewhat resembles the facial hair of a walrus.
You have a wide soul patch and a full mustache that extends a bit downwards at the corners of your lips.
You have a long beard, that goes down to your chest.  Somewhat reminiscent of Santa's mustache.

name.str: Artificial facial hair: very long beard

description: You have a very long beard, that goes down to your waist, like wise old mentors have.
